positive: A stylized, symmetrical composition of a celestial mountain range silhouetted against a dramatic nebula sky. The mountains should feature sharp, jagged peaks reminiscent of stylized glyphs, with crystalline rock formations catching faint, magical bioluminescent light. The nebula incorporates deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, and streaks of ethereal gold dust. Below the peaks, a crescent moon gently illuminates a winding cosmic river, adding symmetry to the base. Style: Graphic novel illustration meeting Art Nouveau precision. Composition: Central, high-contrast silhouette. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the nebula. Color: Deep jewel tones contrasting with luminous cyan accents. Suitable for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: blurry, text, logo, watermark, signature, low detail, jpeg artifacts, grainy, fuzzy, extra limbs, deformed, noisy, bad anatomy, bright lights
